name: Palvella Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Palvella Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for serious, rare genetic diseases with no approved treatments. Their lead candidate is PTX-022, a formulation of rapamycin, for the treatment of pachyonychia congenita (PC). Palvella Therapeutics is headquartered in Wayne, Pennsylvania.
